# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what this PR changes.

## Type of change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Infrastructure
- [ ] Breaking change

## Security and governance checklist

- [ ] This PR does not expose secrets.
- [ ] Sensitive actions require approval.
- [ ] Tool permissions were considered.
- [ ] Audit events were added where needed.
- [ ] Logs do not include tokens, keys or credentials.
- [ ] User-provided content is treated as untrusted input.

## Quality checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated.
- [ ] Documentation updated.
- [ ] Typecheck passes.
- [ ] Lint passes.
- [ ] Build passes.
